title: Velvety Australian Lamb Roast
description: A rich and indulgent lamb roast recipe featuring a velvety sake glaze, perfect for a special occasion dinner.

ingredients.name: Sake
ingredients.notes: Japanese rice wine for added depth of flavor

instructions: Rub the lamb shoulder with olive oil, salt, and pepper, making sure to coat it evenly.
In a small saucepan, combine sake, honey, brown sugar, ginger, and garlic. Bring to a simmer over medium heat, whisking until the sugar dissolves.
Transfer the lamb to a large roasting pan and brush the sake glaze all over the meat.
Place the rosemary sprigs on top of the lamb and roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes per kilogram, or until the internal temperature reaches 60°C (140°F) for medium-rare.
While the lamb is roasting, peel and chop the potatoes into large chunks.
After the lamb has rested for 10 minutes, slice it thinly against the grain and serve with the potatoes, spooning some of the remaining sake glaze over the top.
